description: A vertical, portrait-orientation enforcement-announcement infographic from ICE on a black background. The top half is dominated by a bold all-caps white headline in a heavy sans-serif font reading '13 CHARGED IN ICE HSI & ATF-LED PROBE INTO GUN SMUGGLING RING EXPLOITING THE U.S.-CANADA BORDER,' with the words 'CHARGED IN' and 'EXPLOITING THE' enlarged for emphasis. Centered in the middle of the layout is an inset aerial/satellite map (green and orange shaded regions) with red labeled pins and a red route line marking 'Canadian Border Crossing,' 'Akwesasne (Ontario),' 'Akwesasne (New York state),' and 'US Border Crossing,' illustrating the cross-border smuggling corridor through the Akwesasne Mohawk reservation. The bottom portion shows seized-evidence photographs of multiple black semi-automatic handguns/pistols laid out, including a gloved hand handling one firearm at lower right. A large faint ghosted 'ICE' watermark spans the lower area, alongside the DHS Homeland Security seal and a small ATF/HSI seal next to bold 'HSI' text. The design uses an authoritative law-enforcement aesthetic (dark palette, bold type, evidence photos, maps, agency seals) to publicize a successful international firearms-trafficking prosecution. The messaging technique projects competence and deterrence; target audience is the general public and would-be traffickers, reinforcing ICE/HSI as effective border enforcers.
notable_text: 13 CHARGED IN ICE HSI & ATF-LED PROBE INTO GUN SMUGGLING RING EXPLOITING THE U.S.-CANADA BORDER
